mapper.sql: e.id, e.trip_id, t.title AS trip_title, e.itinerary_day_id, e.itinerary_item_id, e.uploaded_by_user_id, e.title, e.caption, e.location_name, e.lat, e.lng, e.taken_at, e.visibility, e.status, e.created_at
mapper.select: SELECT count(*) FROM record.trip_record_entries WHERE trip_id = #{tripId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'

SELECT rm.record_entry_id, m.id AS media_file_id, m.object_key, m.public_url, m.mime_type, m.byte_size, m.width, m.height, m.status, m.created_at, rm.sort_order FROM record.trip_record_media rm JOIN media.media_files m ON m.id = rm.media_file_id WHERE rm.record_entry_id = #{recordId} AND m.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY rm.sort_order ASC, rm.created_at ASC

SELECT e.trip_id, t.title AS trip_title, e.id AS record_id, e.itinerary_day_id, e.itinerary_item_id, e.uploaded_by_user_id, m.id AS media_file_id, m.object_key, m.public_url, m.mime_type, m.byte_size, m.width, m.height, m.status AS media_status, m.created_at AS media_created_at, e.taken_at, e.created_at FROM record.trip_record_entries e JOIN trip.trips t ON t.id = e.trip_id JOIN record.trip_record_media rm ON rm.record_entry_id = e.id JOIN media.media_files m ON m.id = rm.media_file_id WHERE e.trip_id = #{tripId} AND e.status = 'ACTIVE' AND m.status = 'ACTIVE' AND m.mime_type LIKE 'image/%' ORDER BY e.taken_at DESC NULLS LAST, e.created_at DESC, e.id DESC, rm.sort_order ASC, m.id ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT count(*) FROM record.trip_record_entries e JOIN record.trip_record_media rm ON rm.record_entry_id = e.id JOIN media.media_files m ON m.id = rm.media_file_id WHERE e.trip_id = #{tripId} AND e.status = 'ACTIVE' AND m.status = 'ACTIVE' AND m.mime_type LIKE 'image/%'

SELECT e.trip_id, t.title AS trip_title, e.id AS record_id, e.itinerary_day_id, e.itinerary_item_id, e.uploaded_by_user_id, m.id AS media_file_id, m.object_key, m.public_url, m.mime_type, m.byte_size, m.width, m.height, m.status AS media_status, m.created_at AS media_created_at, e.taken_at, e.created_at FROM record.trip_record_entries e JOIN trip.trips t ON t.id = e.trip_id JOIN record.trip_record_media rm ON rm.record_entry_id = e.id JOIN media.media_files m ON m.id = rm.media_file_id WHERE t.status != 'DELETED' AND ( t.owner_user_id = #{userId} OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM trip.trip_members tm WHERE tm.trip_id = t.id AND tm.user_id = #{userId} AND tm.status = 'ACTIVE' ) ) AND e.status = 'ACTIVE' AND m.status = 'ACTIVE' AND m.mime_type LIKE 'image/%' ORDER BY e.taken_at DESC NULLS LAST, e.created_at DESC, e.id DESC, rm.sort_order ASC, m.id ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT count(*) FROM record.trip_record_entries e JOIN trip.trips t ON t.id = e.trip_id JOIN record.trip_record_media rm ON rm.record_entry_id = e.id JOIN media.media_files m ON m.id = rm.media_file_id WHERE t.status != 'DELETED' AND ( t.owner_user_id = #{userId} OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM trip.trip_members tm WHERE tm.trip_id = t.id AND tm.user_id = #{userId} AND tm.status = 'ACTIVE' ) ) AND e.status = 'ACTIVE' AND m.status = 'ACTIVE' AND m.mime_type LIKE 'image/%'

SELECT DISTINCT m.id AS media_file_id, m.object_key, m.public_url FROM media.media_files m JOIN record.trip_record_media rm ON rm.media_file_id = m.id JOIN record.trip_record_entries e ON e.id = rm.record_entry_id JOIN trip.trips t ON t.id = e.trip_id WHERE m.id = #{mediaFileId} AND m.status = 'ACTIVE' AND m.mime_type LIKE 'image/%' AND e.status = 'ACTIVE' AND t.status != 'DELETED' AND ( t.owner_user_id = #{userId} OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM trip.trip_members tm WHERE tm.trip_id = t.id AND tm.user_id = #{userId} AND tm.status = 'ACTIVE' ) ) LIMIT 1
